targets.query:
from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "prometheus" and r._field == "sequids_events_total")
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "events_per_sec")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "prometheus" and r._field == "sequids_errors_total")
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "errors_per_sec")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "prometheus" and r._field == "sequids_events_total" and r.url == "http://central:8080/metrics")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "prometheus" and r._field == "sequids_events_total" and r.url == "http://worker:8090/metrics")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "prometheus" and r._field == "sequids_errors_total" and r.url == "http://central:8080/metrics")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "prometheus" and r._field == "sequids_errors_total" and r.url == "http://worker:8090/metrics")
  |> last()
